data.title: Tom Lee Invests $150 Million in Ethereum
data.description: According to PANews, Solid Intel reports that Tom Lee has made a significant investment by purchasing $150 million worth of Ethereum (ETH).

data.title: Ethereum's Future Enhancements to Focus on Security and Scalability
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has outlined plans to enhance the security and scalability of the Ethereum network through 'hard invariants.' Reflecting on past improvements, Buterin highlighted the 2021 updates EIP-2929 and EIP-3529, which increased SLOAD costs and reduced refunds. Looking ahead, the 2024 Dencun update aims to weaken the SELFDESTRUCT function. By 2025, Ethereum plans to set a single transaction limit at 16,777,216 gas, which will restrict the executable size of individual transactions or blocks, thereby reducing the risk of denial-of-service attacks and simplifying client operations. Buterin also proposed future measures to set limits on code byte access, ZK-EVM prover cycles, and memory pricing.

data.title: Markets warn the US Treasury: Nominating Hassett as Federal Reserve Chairman could trigger a storm of interest rate cuts.
data.description:
Bond investors have informed the U.S. Treasury Department of their concerns about Kevin Hassett's potential nomination as Federal Reserve Chairman, fearing he might aggressively cut interest rates to appease President Trump.

According to multiple sources familiar with the matter, Treasury officials solicited feedback on Hassett and other candidates during one-on-one conversations with executives from major Wall Street banks, asset management giants, and other key players in the U.S. bond market.

These sources said the discussions took place in November, before Treasury Secretary Bessenter launched the second round of interviews to find a successor to Powell. The Treasury Department stated that it "regularly communicates with a wide range of market participants and investors regarding important developments and dynamics in the U.S. Treasury market and the broader financial markets," adding, "In discussions with key stakeholders, the market's expectations for the potential asset outcomes of the five potential Fed Chair nominees are extremely narrow." As the White House's chief economic officer, Hassett has emerged as a leading candidate for the position in recent weeks, after Trump and Bessenter narrowed the shortlist of potential candidates from an initial 11. Trump said on Tuesday he plans to announce his nominee for Federal Reserve chair "early" next year, and hinted that Hassett is a "potential" contender. The dollar briefly fell after he mentioned Hassett.

data.title: BlackRock Predicts Increased Institutional Adoption of Cryptocurrency Amid U.S. Debt Concerns
data.description:
According to PANews, BlackRock has released a report forecasting a rise in institutional adoption of cryptocurrencies due to the anticipated increase in U.S. debt, which is expected to surpass $38 trillion. The report, citing CoinDesk, suggests that traditional financial hedging tools may become ineffective, prompting institutions to turn to digital assets like Bitcoin. BlackRock's outlook on U.S. Treasury bonds and the American economy is pessimistic, highlighting economic vulnerabilities and leverage risks associated with artificial intelligence as factors driving this shift.

BlackRock has identified Bitcoin ETFs as a significant revenue source, indicating that digital assets could reach new heights by 2026. CEO Larry Fink has emphasized that "tokenization" will be the next phase for financial markets. The report also notes that stablecoins have emerged as a crucial bridge between traditional finance and digital liquidity.

source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-shadow-chair-liquidity-risk/

data.title: Strategy Prepares for Potential Bitcoin Bear Market with $1.44 Billion Reserve
data.description:
According to Odaily, on-chain analytics firm CryptoQuant reported today that Michael Saylor's Bitcoin-holding company, Strategy (MSTR), has established a $1.44 billion cash reserve this week. This move indicates the company's preparation for a potential Bitcoin bear market.

CryptoQuant suggests that the establishment of a 24-month cash buffer signifies a 'tactical shift' for Strategy. The company is transitioning from its previous aggressive strategy of issuing stock to purchase Bitcoin to a more conservative, liquidity-focused approach. This reduces the risk of being forced to sell Bitcoin during market downturns. Julio Moreno, CryptoQuant's head of research, predicts that if the bear market persists, Bitcoin prices could trade between $70,000 and $55,000 next year.

data.title: Stable and Theo Invest Over $100 Million in Tokenized U.S. Treasury Fund
data.description: According to Odaily, Stable and Theo have jointly invested more than $100 million into the Delta Wellington Ultra-Short-Term U.S. Treasury On-Chain Fund (ULTRA). Managed by FundBridge Capital and Wellington Management Company, the fund is supported by the tokenization platform Libeara. ULTRA is among the first institutional-grade U.S. Treasury strategy products to be launched in tokenized form and has received a Particula AAA rating.

data.title: Ethereum Activates the Fusaka Upgrade With Smooth Finalization – Here Is How It Transforms Layer-2 Scaling
data.description:
Ethereum has successfully activated the highly anticipated Fusaka upgrade, which has been implemented with a smooth finalization process. This pivotal upgrade is set to significantly transform the landscape of Layer-2 scaling solutions. In this context, we will delve into the specific mechanisms of the Fusaka upgrade, exploring how it enhances transaction speeds, reduces gas fees, and improves overall network efficiency. Additionally, we will examine the implications of these changes for developers and users alike, revealing how the upgrade empowers decentralized applications and fosters greater adoption of Ethereum's Layer-2 solutions. Overall, the Fusaka upgrade marks a substantial advancement in Ethereum's capabilities, promising to bolster its position in the competitive blockchain ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-activates-the-fusaka-upgrade-with-smooth-finalization-here-is-how-it-transforms-layer-2-scaling/
